query: Does the starting price include food?
direct_answer: For Porch & Party, grazing-table and styled table setups start at $250+ for styling only. Food is not included by default and can be quoted separately when requested.
best_for: This page is for hosts and organizers who need a straight answer on what the base grazing-table price actually covers.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
